text.title: Agent Observability Stack Blueprint Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying agent-observability-stack-blueprint must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

required.field: Fields: provider, model, input_t, output_t, usd.

forbidden.pattern: No stack without per-request cost tagging.
No stack without OTel for LLM calls.
No 100% LLM-judge sampling on prod traffic.
No 'we'll add observability later' deferral past pre-prod.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key (slug, id, name) before serialising.
Round numeric values to 2 decimal places when serialising.

example.note: Missing the first required field and `forbidden_seen` is non-empty — schema rejects both.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
